Off Calendar Jun-12-2019 Continued To Jul-10-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gerald Woods for and with Rolando Dusuau.
Sara Summerall for Vita Ogans.

Ms. Summerall stated that she filed a competing petition on Monday. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to July 10, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to be heard with the competing petition.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-15-2019 Continued To Jun-12-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gerald Woods for Rolando Dusuau (Petitioner).
Kevin Ogans (Brother of Decedent) in Propria Persona.
Oscar Ogans (Brother of Decedent) in Propria Persona.

This was a pre-granted matter. Kevin Ogans stated that he is here to object to Rolando being appointed as the administrator, that they were not notified of this hearing, that one of the other Brothers happened to find an article about the hearing and that he has not had a chance to speak with an Attorney. Kevin Ogans also stated that he provided care for his Sister and spoke of a history of elder abuse. Mr. Woods stated that he is not aware of any notice requirements to other parties, that the mortgage is in arears one or two months, and that he thinks the issue is that Priscilla (Mother of Decedent) had been a joint tenant with the Decedent. The Court advised Counsel that he can file an ex parte petition for appointment of a Special Administrator if needed. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to June 12, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
